pullRequest.title: DOM-55547 Fix Flaky Running a job with embedded spark cluster test

nodes.body:
I fear that the order is not guaranteed but it seems like the following steps depend on the fact that the order is guaranteed.

LGTM

I don't think the particular step `to see a table that contains rows matching` cares about order, but to your point the last two rows aren't really important for the test to see, just the top one. I'll remove the bottom two rows just because they're not needed.
